title: Source change without test change is flagged as test obligation
text:
diff --git a/src/semantic_guard/scoring.py b/src/semantic_guard/scoring.py
--- a/src/semantic_guard/scoring.py
+++ b/src/semantic_guard/scoring.py
@@
+def normalize_score(raw: float) -> float:
+    return max(0.0, min(1.0, raw))
intent: score normalization helper を追加する。
rationale: Executable source changes need test changes or an explicit verification reason.
